title: [Slice 1] Foundation & Project Setup
description: Initialize FastAPI project structure, add requirements.txt, configure basic settings, create __init__.py files
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI project initialized with proper folder structure
requirements.txt contains all necessary dependencies (fastapi, uvicorn, pytest, pydantic)

title: [Slice 2] Data Models & In-Memory Storage
description: Define Expense model with all required fields, implement in-memory storage with CRUD operations, add unit tests for models and storage
acceptance_criteria: Expense model defined with: id, employee_id, amount, description, status, created_at, approved_at, processed_at, rejection_reason, manager_id, finance_id
In-memory storage implementation with get, create, update, list operations
Unit tests for storage CRUD operations
>80% code coverage for models and storage

title: [Slice 3] Authentication Middleware
description: Implement header-based auth (X-User-ID, X-User-Role), create middleware, add role validation, include error handling
acceptance_criteria: Middleware extracts X-User-ID and X-User-Role headers
User context available to route handlers

title: [Slice 4] Employee - Submit Expense Claim
description: Implement POST /expenses endpoint with input validation (amount, description), create expense with pending status, add integration tests
acceptance_criteria: POST /expenses endpoint accepts amount and description
Input validation: amount > 0, description non-empty (1-500 chars)
Tests for validation errors (invalid amount, empty description)
Tests for access control (managers/finance cannot submit)

title: [Slice 5] Employee - View Claims
description: Implement GET /expenses (list with status filter) and GET /expenses/{id} (view single), add access control, include integration tests
acceptance_criteria: GET /expenses lists all claims by current employee
Employees can only see their own claims
Rejection reasons visible when claim is rejected
Integration tests for viewing specific claims
Tests for access control (cannot see other employees' claims)

title: [Slice 6] Manager - Approve & Reject Claims
description: Implement GET /expenses?status=pending, POST /expenses/{id}/approve, POST /expenses/{id}/reject with rejection reason capture, add state transition validation, include integration tests
acceptance_criteria: GET /expenses?status=pending shows all pending claims (any employee)
Reject transitions pending → rejected with reason stored
Invalid state transitions blocked (e.g., cannot approve rejected claim)

title: [Slice 7] Finance - List & Process Claims
description: Implement GET /expenses?status=approved, POST /expenses/{id}/process endpoint with state transition, add integration tests
acceptance_criteria: Only approved claims can be processed
Only finance role can process (role validation)
Tests for invalid transitions (cannot process rejected/pending claims)

title: [Slice 8] Comprehensive Error Handling & Edge Cases
description: Add validation for edge cases (negative amounts, empty fields, invalid transitions), test unauthorized access scenarios, ensure >80% coverage, add remaining edge case tests
acceptance_criteria: All error responses include descriptive messages
Edge case tests for all workflows
